work_summary: Focused on setting up and understanding Nix-based dependency management for the project. Explored how Nix expressions define reproducible environments and worked on configuring development dependencies required for the backend. Added necessary packages into the Nix configuration, tested builds, and ensured the environment could be consistently reproduced across systems. Also compared traditional package management approaches with Nix to understand its advantages in isolation and reproducibility.
learnings: Developed a strong understanding of declarative dependency management, reproducible environments, and how Nix improves consistency in development workflows.
blockers: Faced initial challenges understanding Nix syntax and debugging configuration errors.

work_summary: Continued refining the Nix setup by resolving dependency conflicts and ensuring compatibility between required packages. Analyzed the backend architecture in detail, including models, serializers, and database structure, in preparation for implementing new revenue and commission features. Reviewed how existing data flows through the system and identified areas where modifications would be required. Performed testing to validate that the environment was stable after dependency adjustments.
learnings: Improved understanding of backend architecture, dependency resolution, and maintaining compatibility across different system components.
blockers: Encountered version mismatches and dependency conflicts which required troubleshooting and testing.

work_summary: Worked on implementing new revenue and commission models in the backend. Designed and added new database fields to support different commission structures and updated corresponding serializers and business logic. Ensured that calculations were accurate and aligned with requirements by writing and running test cases. Also verified database migrations and validated that new data structures integrated correctly with existing ones without breaking functionality.
learnings: Learned how to design scalable business logic, implement financial calculations, and maintain data integrity within a relational database system.
blockers: Ensuring correctness of commission calculations and avoiding data inconsistencies during integration.

work_summary: Worked on integrating frontend components with backend APIs. Connected UI elements to newly created API endpoints and ensured proper data exchange between client and server. Tested API responses using frontend workflows and debugged issues related to incorrect data formats and missing fields. Coordinated changes between frontend and backend to maintain consistency and improve usability.
learnings: Gained hands-on experience in full-stack development, particularly in API integration and handling asynchronous data flow.
blockers: Faced issues with mismatched data structures and response handling between frontend and backend.

work_summary: Enhanced API reliability by improving error handling and validating edge cases in both frontend and backend. Conducted thorough end-to-end testing of revenue and commission workflows to ensure accurate data processing. Identified and fixed minor bugs affecting UI rendering and data display. Improved user interface elements to clearly present financial data and ensured smooth interaction with backend services.
learnings: Understood the importance of comprehensive testing, proper error handling, and delivering a seamless user experience in full-stack applications.
blockers: Handling unexpected edge cases in API responses required additional validation logic.

work_summary: Performed a comprehensive review of all implemented features. Cleaned up the codebase by removing redundant code, improving structure, and ensuring adherence to best practices. Documented the newly added revenue and commission systems, including their design and usage. Verified system stability through testing and ensured that both frontend and backend components were functioning correctly after integration.
learnings: Improved skills in code optimization, documentation, and maintaining clean and scalable software architecture.
